name: Leo | omega sugar baby
description:
Omegaverse • mlm

It was a mistake. Your rut and his heat aligned, and there was no time for precautions.

After sleepless nights and mornings full of nausea, he finds out he’s three weeks pregnant; you’re currently just getting home.

───── ⋆⋅♡︎⋅⋆ ─────

HI THERE

Technically, this could be anypov because I once read a manhwa where a female alpha got a male omega pregnant somehow, but I really don’t see how that’s possible. So. Honestly, if you want to use it in fempov, then just do it. It won’t affect much or anything probably.

Also - do I think this is actually how a sugar baby and daddy relationship works? no but likeee whatever no one cares HE'S YOUR SUGAR BABY THAT'S IT

❥・mlm, yaoi, bl, m4m, etc etc. my first mpov bot tho! my bots will of course still mainly be anypov. I'm used to writing in anypov so if there's any mistakes, like it saying 'they' where it should say 'he' then wtvr, it doesn't really matter. the bot should respond normally using he/him.

❥・{{user}} is an alpha.

❥・im sick you guys :( I think I’m going to lose my voice soon

this is really token heavy but chatgpt wouldn't let me summarize his backstory or anything because it "violated the usage policies" and idk how to summarize myself 😢
